title: Cold Weather Payment estimates: 2025 to 2026
body: " Find out about getting a Cold Weather Payment.   The estimated number of eligible recipients and triggers in the data tables are to 2 January 2026  The weekly and monthly estimated payments include breakdowns for England and Wales, in addition to the total estimates.  The Cold Weather Payments scheme runs from 1 November 2025 to 31 March 2026. This is known as the Cold Weather Payment season. "
